scripts.postprocess: ffmpeg -y -i ../CommandLess-final.remotion.mp4 -c:v libx264 -preset slow -b:v 14M -minrate 14M -maxrate 14M -bufsize 14M -x264-params nal-hrd=cbr:filler=1 -pix_fmt yuv420p -c:a copy -movflags +faststart ../CommandLess-final.mp4
scripts.render: npm run render:remotion && npm run postprocess
